title: Tillandsia piepenbringii
taxonomy: Tillandsia piepenbringii is a species of the genus Tillandsia, which belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. Tillandsia piepenbringii is a type of epiphyte that is native to South America. The Bromeliaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Tillandsia piepenbringii, along with other members of the Tillandsia genus, is known for its ability to absorb moisture and nutrients through its leaves. The classification of Tillandsia piepenbringii reflects its unique adaptations to its environment and its relationships with other plants in its ecosystem.

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing inflammation, and combating infections.
